industries.guidelines: Focus on technical depth, scalability, and system architecture. High-impact metrics include performance optimizations (e.g., 'Reduced latency by 40%'), deployment frequency, and automation of repetitive tasks.
Emphasize data-driven decision making and model impact. Look for metrics related to accuracy improvements, cost savings through prediction, or insights that led to strategic shifts.
Prioritize growth metrics and campaign performance. Key results include ROAS (Return on Ad Spend), conversion rate improvements, customer acquisition cost (CAC), and brand reach growth.
Focus on product-market fit, user growth, and feature impact. Emphasize cross-functional leadership and the ability to define and measure success across a product lifecycle.

general.guidelines: Maintain a professional, active tone. Use strong action verbs at the start of every bullet point. Ensure consistent formatting and a clean, readable structure.
